arts.ttl: Newcastle United board's under radar investment unlocks PSR game-changer as 15-year-old 'wows' - Ciaran Kelly
arts.sum: Well, rather than being restricted to a catchment area, Newcastle are able to recruit players nationally at under-15 level and under-16 level (provided they are placed in full-time education). It is still very early days for Mills and his team-mates, but something is stirring at academy level and signings such as Leo Shahar, Rory Finneran and Trevan Sanusi have slotted in alongside promising local talents like Aidan Harris, Anthony Munda and Sean Neave.

arts.ttl: Sir Bobby made Newcastle United star chase team bus
arts.sum: Former Newcastle United manager Sir Bobby Robson is remembered for many things, including the time he inadvertently left one of his players behind at a hotel, leading to an unusual chase. Alan Shearer recounted the event to Gary Lineker and Micah Richards on the Match of the Day: Top 10 podcast in 2021, saying: "You think I was a stickler for being on time, worse than I was, was the late, great Sir Bobby Robson," reports the Daily Star .

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to get unexpected glimpse of signing club refused to sanction for Steve Bruce
arts.sum: Leicester City are facing a midfield crisis ahead of Saturday's Premier League showdown with Newcastle United at St James' Park - with a former Magpies transfer target now likely to be handed his big chance. “He has a hamstring injury so he’s not available for the game,” van Nistelrooy told Leicester Live of Ndidi, “We’re looking at the progress and will see how he reacts to the injury, but it looks like it will at least be a couple of weeks.”
